heading: Veterans Innovation Partnership Fellowship Program
label: 2665b Veterans Innovation Partnership Fellowship Program
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.heading: In General
children.label: a In General
children.text: There shall be in the Department a Veterans Innovation Partnership Fellowship Program (hereinafter in this section referred to as the “VIP Fellowship Program”).

children.heading: Finding
children.label: b Finding
children.text: Congress finds that the VIP Fellowship Program plays a vital role in providing veterans with professional experience, training, and pathways to careers in international affairs, while strengthening the Department’s recruitment of skilled, diverse, and service-minded personnel.
expand opportunities for veterans to gain professional experience in diplomacy, development, and international cooperation;
leverage the skills, leadership, and expertise of veterans to enhance the work of the Department and other participating agencies; and
support the transition of veterans into public service careers, particularly in foreign affairs.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: d Administration
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall be administered by the Department, consistent with existing law and regulations, and in coordination with relevant Federal departments and agencies and veteran-serving organizations.
